rationale: Companion PR to cursor-hasanigordon-afk-unbound-pr1 in the same ReZilient/AFK Unbound project; iterating on the same UI/feature set. Same conclusion: substantial product work with coherent imports, feature additions, and routing updates. The error-swallow detector finding is the same false-positive pattern observed in pr1 (idempotent DDL migration or defensible empty-catch idiom). No evidence of cheating.
